title: orthocarpus bracteosus
intro: Orthocarpus bracteosus, also known as the woolly bract spiderwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the broomrape family and is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Orthocarpus bracteosus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
